package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_resource_pooling_db_pool_created_per_repository: Layer: Resource pooling. Flag database pools constructed per repository instance instead of shared process ownership.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule580NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario580Negative(records []Rule580NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
